category_sources: source_facts.description says Harper is a grammar checker for developers; official repository describes an offline, privacy-first grammar checker.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides harper; official repository and docs use Harper.
docs_sources: Official Harper repository links harper-ls documentation on writewithharper.com.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/Automattic/harper; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, executables harper-cli and harper-ls, and official repository identify a Rust-powered grammar checker with language-server integration.
